description_long: This adult pedestrian is depicted with a muscular build and extensive full-body tattoos, visible on the arms, legs, neck, and face. The individual is dressed in a short-sleeved, collared shirt tucked into knee-length shorts, and wears a wristwatch on the left wrist. The footwear consists of chunky, athletic-style shoes. The face is adorned with intricate tattoo patterns, and the hair is styled in a high topknot or bun. The skin tone is light, and the overall appearance is urban and contemporary, with a strong emphasis on body art. The figure stands in a neutral, upright pose with arms slightly bent at the elbows.
description: A tattooed adult with a muscular build, wearing a collared shirt, shorts, and athletic shoes, standing upright with a topknot hairstyle.
description_view_0: Front view shows detailed tattoos, facial features, collared shirt, shorts, wristwatch, and athletic shoes.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the topknot hairstyle, the shirt's fit, and the shape of the shoes.
description_view_2: Rear view silhouettes the figure, emphasizing the overall body shape and hairstyle without visible details.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile of the topknot and the fit of the clothing.
attribute_clothing_type: short-sleeved collared shirt and knee-length shorts with a wristwatch accessory
attribute_hairstyle: long hair styled in a high topknot bun
